calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien And For Judgment That No Lien Exists, And For Costs And Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Henry Yu, 415.398.8308 of CCD Law Group appearing via Zoom for Petitioner Paramount Estate LLC.
Cary Wing, No phone number provided, Respondent appearing on his own behalf.

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER PARAMOUNT ESTATE LLC Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien And For Judgment That No Lien Exists, And For Costs And Attorneys Fees is GRANTED. The subject property is ordered released from the claim of lien. (Code Civ. Proc., 8488(b).) Petitioner is awarded $4,005 in attorney's fees. (Code Civ. Proc., 8488(c).) No opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien And For Judgment That No Lien Exists, And For Costs And Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jan-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER PARAMOUNT ESTATE LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN AND FOR JUDGMENT THAT NO LIEN EXISTS, AND FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CC 8486(b) and CC 8116(c). Additionally, it does not appear from the service reports filed on January 17, 2023 that the person subserved is a member of the household at 11 Humboldt and may be an occupant of 15 Humboldt.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION / Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien Or For Judgment That No Lien Exists, And For Costs And Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Henry Yu; CCD Law Group, P.C.; 415-398-8308; appearing on behalf of petitioner Paramount Estate LLC.

No other appearances. Mr. Yu states he wishes to contest the court's tentative ruling, but states that no notice was given that they would be appearing in court to contest. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PARAMOUNT ESTATE LLC'S MOTION / NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIEN OR FOR JUDGMENT THAT NO LIEN EXISTS, AND FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service on file. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
